\subsection{Metrics}
%
%Many previous works~\cite{decao2021autoregressive, ganea2017deep, ayoola-etal-2022-refined} report the micro-averaged F1 score from Gerbil evaluation tool.
%In our approach, we always take the top-1 prediction as the final prediction.
%Since each mention is only associated with one target entity, the micro-averaged F1 score is equivalent to the accuracy in this case (accuracy = precision = recall = F1)
%We report the accuracy as the evaluation metric for the ED task and didn't use Gerbil evaluation tool.
